mapper.select: SELECT CA.APPLY_NUMBER AS applyNumber, C.CARE_NUMBER AS careNumber, C.CARE_DATE AS careDate, US.SHELTER_NAME AS shelterName, CA.USER_NUMBER AS userNumber FROM DDD_CARE_APPLY CA JOIN DDD_CARE C ON CA.CARE_NUMBER = C.CARE_NUMBER JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON C.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER WHERE CA.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY CA.APPLY_NUMBER DESC
